description: A transaction is closing tomorrow. The TC needs to create a CDA to send to the title company so the agent gets paid.

nodes.task_description: Verify the final sales price and commission percentage from the transaction file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the final price and commission structure.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the gross commission and subtract any brokerage fees or splits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the net commission payable to the agent and the brokerage.

nodes.task_description: Generate the CDA form and send it to the title company and the agent.

expected_outcome.value: A CDA document is created and distributed to all necessary parties.
